name: Stark
description: Stark — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Stark — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Stark: Stark — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: WCAG contrast check run inside Figma before design handoff
Figma layer vision simulator previewing color-blind experience
Focus order annotation added to design file for developer spec
Accessibility auto-annotation workflow triggered on component update
Team a11y checklist embedded in Figma design review process

pros: Strong Figma and design-tool integration for a11y
Shifts accessibility checks left into design phase
Contrast, typography and focus-order checks in-editor
Popular with design teams, good community
cons: Design-time focus, not runtime site monitoring
Requires designers to adopt new workflows
review.verdict: Best a11y tool for design teams, embedding checks in Figma, but you still need runtime scanners on shipped code.
review.best_for: Design teams catching a11y issues in Figma before engineering.
review.not_for: Teams wanting automated scans of production web apps.
